mapper.select:
SELECT G.GROUPBUY_ID , G.STORE_ID , S.STORE_NM , G.LOCATION_ID , L.LOCATION_NM , G.PRODUCT_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.ORG_SALES_PRICE /* 현장가 */ , G.GROUPBUY_NM , G.GROUPBUY_TYPE , G.TARGET_QTY , G.TARGET_AMOUNT , G.CURRENT_QTY , G.CURRENT_AMOUNT , G.START_DATE , G.END_DATE , G.PICKUP_START_DATE , G.PICKUP_END_DATE , G.STATUS , G.PAY_TYPE FROM groupbuy_mst G LEFT JOIN store_mst S ON G.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst L ON G.LOCATION_ID = L.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN product_mst P ON G.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID
WHERE G.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND G.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
AND G.START_DATE >= #{startDate} AND G.START_DATE < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND G.STATUS != 'CANCEL' ORDER BY G.START_DATE DESC

SELECT JM.GROUPBUY_JOIN_MST_ID
, JM.USER_ID , U.NAME
, JM.TMP_USER_ID , JM.TMP_PHONE_NO
, JM.JOIN_STATUS
, JM.TOTAL_QTY , JM.TOTAL_PRICE
, CASE WHEN JM.TOTAL_QTY > 0 THEN JM.TOTAL_PRICE / JM.TOTAL_QTY ELSE 0 END AS UNIT_PRICE
, JM.SALES_ID , JM.CREATE_DATE
FROM groupbuy_join_mst JM LEFT JOIN user_mst U ON JM.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
WHERE JM.GROUPBUY_ID = #{groupbuyId}
AND JM.JOIN_STATUS = #{joinStatus}
ORDER BY JM.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update:
/** batch : 공동구매 시작 처리 */ UPDATE groupbuy_mst SET status = 'START', update_date = NOW() WHERE status = 'READY'
AND start_date <= NOW()
/** batch : 공동구매 픽업 시간 지난 후 노쇼 처리 */ UPDATE groupbuy_join_mst SET join_status = 'NOSHOW', update_date = NOW() WHERE groupbuy_id = #{groupbuyId} AND join_status = 'JOIN' AND SALES_ID IS NULL
